calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick Larsen for and with Christina Miller, Administrator (via Zoom).
Maylene Lynch, heir, is present (via Zoom).

The court acknowledged the recently filed supplement that amended some of the distribution amounts, and asked petitioner's counsel whether it had been served on all parties and beneficiaries. Mr. Larsen stated that the supplement was not served on the parties but that notice of the hearing was given. Mr. Larsen reported that Ms. Miller has waived her request for extraordinary fees to expedite the estate's closure. This waiver increases the amounts distributed to beneficiaries and offsets any minimal interest discrepancy from previous reimbursement adjustments. The court acknowledged the waiver and directed counsel to submit an amended proposed order reflecting this change.

The court waived notice of the supplement and took the matter under submission with the intent to grant. The court noted that further adjustments may be required to attorney's fees in light of the administrator's waiver of extraordinary fees.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Continued To Feb-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Feb-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick J. Larsen for Christina Miller, Administrator (via Zoom).

The court inquired as to whether counsel had seen the examiner's notes and as to how they intended to address them. Mr. Larsen stated he had not yet addressed the issues raised in the examiner's notes as he had only recently reviewed them.

The court instructed Mr. Larsen to file a supplement to address the issues raised in the examiner's notes. The supplement must be verified by Christina Miller and filed no later than January 28, 2025. The court continued the matter to February 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Continued To Dec-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Continued To Nov-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Larsen appeared by zoom for Christina Miller (administrator).

Mr. Larsen stated that they are in the midst of doing an accounting and a petition for final distribution, that he needs a bit more time to finalize it and get it filed, and requested a 45-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to August 27, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.
